name: Pantheon
title: The Artisan of War
shortBio:
- Aegis Protection (P) blocks damage after casting multiple times
- Grand Skyfall (R) is a circle AoE
- Heartseeker Strike (E) - Pantheon stands still and strikes

skins.name: Myrmidon Pantheon
skins.description: “They say the Myrmidons were shaped by the gods—that Zeus himself quickened life into magma. But then, the Myrmidons marched. They marched against us. And in the ash of their skin, the fire of their merciless eyes, I saw all the wars that humanity had wrought. That they... were us.”

skins.name: Dragonslayer Pantheon
skins.description: When dragon fire consumed the world, heroes rose from the embers and cast down the beasts of legend. These warriors passed into history, then myth… until Pantheon alone remained, the last of the ancient dragonslayers, swearing upon the skies eternal revenge.

skins.name: Baker Pantheon
skins.description: He's the armored dough-puncher, the Targonian Aspect of tasty pastries. He always wanted to be a baker, and now he'll throw down in the ultimate cooking showdown. Put your hands together for Pantheon!

skins.name: Ruined Pantheon

chromas.name: Ruined Pantheon (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2021.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2021.

chromas.name: Ruined Pantheon (Cursed)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the 2021 Sentinels event.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the 2021 Sentinels event.

skins.description: The Mist did not just subsume Atreus, but also resurrected the long-dead spirit of Pantheon: the old Aspect of War himself. With Atreus' stubborn defiance silenced, Pantheon can resume control and revel in battle once again. It doesn't matter to him whose banner he fights under. If that banner is the Ruined King's? So be it.

skins.name: Prestige Ascended Pantheon
skins.description: Pantheon was defeated once, but with all of Runeterra on the line now Atreus must defeat it himself. Seizing back control from the Aspect of War, Atreus harnesses the celestial power of Targon itself—briefly becoming not just a vessel or an Aspect, but something new. Something immensely powerful and entirely his own.

skins.name: Chosen of the Wolf Pantheon

chromas.name: Chosen of the Wolf Pantheon (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2024.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2024.

chromas.name: Chosen of the Wolf Pantheon (Rose Quartz)

skins.description: Why was the spearman chosen, dear Wolf? Did his spirit catch your eye, or was it his steadfastness? Regardless, he has done what was asked of him. He was a worthy first test for the mighty Noxian general. What fate awaits him now? He will prove his worth once more, and join the hunt.

skins.name: Classic Pantheon
skins.description: Man-dropping onto the Rift on February 2, 2010, Pantheon mastered the art of war with crits against low-health foes, turret shot blocking, and Black Cleaver stacking. A premier lane bully, his point-and-click stun and barrage of spears meant death for squishies. But despite his warlike nature, Pantheon always wanted to be a baker. Get that bread, Panth.

passive.name: Aegis Protection
passive.description: After attacking or casting spells 4 times, Pantheon will block the next incoming basic attack or turret attack.

spells.name: Spear Shot
spells.description: Pantheon hurls his spear at an opponent, dealing damage.
spells.dynamicDescription: Pantheon hurls his spear at an opponent, dealing<physicalDamage> @TotalDamage@ physical damage</physicalDamage>. @SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Aegis of Zeonia
spells.description: Pantheon leaps at an enemy and bashes the enemy with his shield, stunning them.  After finishing the attack, Pantheon readies himself to block the next attack.
spells.dynamicDescription: Pantheon leaps at the target enemy and deals <magicDamage>@TotalDamage@ magic damage</magicDamage> and <status>Stuns</status> them for @StunDuration@ second(s). Pantheon also instantly refreshes his <spellName>Aegis Protection</spellName>.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Heartseeker Strike
spells.description: Pantheon focuses and unleashes 3 swift strikes to the area in front of him, dealing double damage to champions. Pantheon also becomes more aware of his enemy's vital spots, allowing him to always crit enemies below 15% health.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Passive: Spear Shot, Heartseeker Strike, and Pantheon's basic attacks gain 100% critical strike chance against targets below @PassiveCritThreshold*100@% health.

Active: Pantheon channels and deals @NumberOfStrikes@ swift strikes in front of him for @TotalDamage@ physical damage per strike (total @MaximumDamageTooltip@).@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Grand Skyfall
spells.description: Pantheon composes himself and then leaps into the air to a target, striking all enemy units in an area. Enemies closer to the impact point take more damage.
spells.dynamicDescription: Pantheon gathers his strength and then leaps high into the air, crashing down at the target area a few seconds later. Deals up to <magicDamage>@MaxDamage@ magic damage</magicDamage> to units at the center (down to <magicDamage>@MinDamage@ magic damage</magicDamage> at the edge) and <status>Slows</status> them by @SlowAmount*100@% for @SlowDuration@ second.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@
